changes.change: Wall tile visibility: brightened tile back texture (#C8B888 → #FAF6EC), darkened inner playing area (0xE8D4A8 → 0xD8C498), increased wall tile scale (0.78 → 0.82), reduced wall shadow opacity (0.35 → 0.22), wider lattice lines on backs

Removed duplicate bottom-right toolbar (was identical to top-right). Wired up Settings button to open settings overlay modal. Added openSettings/closeSettings methods with close-on-overlay-click. Single clean toolbar in top-right only, matching mockup layout.

Wall tiles more prominent: scale 0.82→0.90, layer gap 0.10→0.04 (tighter stacking), wallDist 3.8→3.6 (closer to center), shadow opacity 0.22→0.30, tile depth D 0.40→0.45. Walls now clearly frame the playing area.

Bottom UI cleanup: hid redundant .player-label (South bubble already shows info), moved turn indicator from bottom:138px→200px (no overlap), repositioned #p-south to bottom:80px right:20px in column layout (clean corner placement). Eliminates all bottom UI element overlap.

Green tile backs polished: gold border trim (#C8A84E) replacing muddy brown, gold lattice pattern (rgba 200,168,78) on green backs instead of clashing brown strokes, double-circle center motif, dark green sides (0x2B5A3A) for face-down wall tiles. Settings tile color picker wired up with localStorage persistence. Walls now look like proper mahjong tile backs — green with gold accents.

notes: Round 5 — POLISH ONLY. Do NOT change tile back color (green #3B7A5A). Do NOT change side color (dark brown #7A6240 for face-up). Do NOT change camera (y6 z9). Focus: wall visibility, composition, UI cleanup, overall mockup match.
